creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is the shar file as attachment (scribus-devel.txt) to add scribus-devel version (http://www.scribus.net/) to the port tree (print category)

Makefile is based on the scribus stable version (print/scribus - 1.3.3.14) with some modifications : QT4 and Patch for FreeBSD.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
